descriptions.text: Quinty is an unreleased puzzle game that developed by Game Freak for the Super Famicom in 1999. The game was a remake of the Famicom/NES game of the same name, which is also titled Mendel Palace outside of Japan. On October 12, 2024, 3 prototype builds of the game were leaked during the 2024 Game Freak Leak.

Mendel Palace is a 1989 puzzle video game developed by Game Freak for the Nintendo Entertainment System. It was published in Japan by Namco and in North America by Hudson Soft. Mendel Palace is the debut game of Satoshi Tajiri and his company Game Freak. This success inspired him to create the Pokémon series.
